homeTiles.title: Knowledge commons
homeTiles.summary: Durable, contributed knowledge — frameworks, patterns, and references. Read before you contribute if you are still finding your footing.

homeTiles.title: Community highlights
homeTiles.summary: Discussions, help requests, events, and announcements from practitioners — reply, follow, offer help, or join right from each item.

homeTiles.title: Draft a contribution
homeTiles.summary: Describe a field experience — wins, failures, or surprises — and shape it into a draft with the companion.

homeTiles.title: Apprenticeship
homeTiles.summary: Judgment training for the AI era — real projects and short mentorship chains. Program preparing to launch.

homeTiles.title: Weekly prompts
homeTiles.summary: Reply to the current community question when your experience matches — a lighter-weight way to contribute.

homeTiles.summary: Holistic text entry for agents — community intro, API version, and how to read or submit on behalf of a human.
